overall.description: A first-person walkthrough in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) approaching and entering the Grand Imperial Mall. The clip begins outdoors in a sunny futuristic urban plaza, passing neon signage and approaching a large commercial building with a distinctive geodesic dome, then transitions through glass entrance doors into a spacious, multi-level indoor atrium with palm trees and a central statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza in front of commercial mall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the Grand Imperial Mall entrance past the Caliente neon sign

notable_agents.action: abandoned van parked near the mall entrance steps

entered.detail: large orange neon sign with retro styling mounted on a curved structure
large teal and gray commercial building with geometric metal framework and large signage
distinctive metal lattice dome structure covering the roof of the building
tropical palm trees lining the plaza approach to the mall
derelict gray van parked along the curb near the entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a sunlit futuristic plaza toward the Grand Imperial Mall. The Caliente neon sign passes by on the left as the camera approaches the main building facade with its distinctive geodesic dome structure. An abandoned van sits near the entrance steps, and the area is completely devoid of pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: mall entrance threshold with covered awning

events.description: passing through automatic glass doors from outdoor plaza into the mall interior atrium

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance, briefly looking up at the building facade, then stepping through the glass doors into the atrium

entered.detail: automatic sliding glass doors with metal frames marking the mall entrance
spacious multi-level interior space with patterned flooring visible through the entrance

segments.scene_description: Approaching the mall entrance, the camera moves up the steps and pauses briefly to look up at the tall facade with its geometric glass panels. The transition from bright sunlight to the dimmer interior occurs as the camera passes through the automatic glass doors, revealing the spacious atrium with its distinctive tiled floor and distant palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level indoor shopping atrium with glass ceiling

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the upper balconies and glass ceiling structure of the atrium

agents.ego_description: walking through the empty mall atrium toward the central statue, then looking up at the upper levels and skylight

entered.detail: geometric floor tiles in blue and beige patterns covering the atrium ground
large potted palm trees arranged in the atrium center
abstract sculptural artwork on a pedestal in the middle of the atrium
multiple levels of shopping balconies with glass railings on both sides of the atrium
glowing cyan neon sign for 'softsys' on the right side wall
glass ceiling panels allowing natural light to filter into the atrium from above

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the Grand Imperial Mall's atrium, passing between interior palm trees and approaching a central abstract statue. The multi-level interior features balconies on both sides and neon signage including 'softsys'. The camera continues forward then tilts upward to reveal the glass skylight ceiling and structural beams of the upper levels, emphasizing the vertical scale of the empty mall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, desolate futuristic plaza into the cavernous, multi-level interior of the Grand Imperial Mall. It begins by gliding through the sunlit square, passing a Caliente neon sign and an abandoned van as the geodesic dome of the mall looms ahead. As the camera ascends the entrance steps and pauses to take in the geometric glass facade, the lighting shifts from brilliant daylight to a dimmer interior glow upon passing through the automatic glass doors. The scene then expands into a spacious atrium with tiled floors and interior palm trees, moving past neon softsys signage toward a central abstract statue. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal the massive structural beams and glass skylight, emphasizing the vertical scale of the empty commercial space.
